response.justification: Candidate has extensive full-stack engineering experience spanning 25+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with notable work on developer tooling (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators). However, the resume shows no formal people management or team leadership experience, which is a hard requirement for this Engineering Manager role. There is also no demonstrated experience with build systems at scale or mobile platform ecosystem tooling, which are central focus areas.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP frameworks
Strong technical breadth across languages, platforms, and stacks with 25+ years of hands-on engineering
Has delivered workshops and courses (Selenium, Web Internals, TDD), showing mentoring and knowledge-sharing aptitude
concerns: No explicit people management or direct-report leadership experience — title is Staff/Senior IC, not manager
No demonstrated experience with large-scale mobile platform build/test infrastructure
Resume timeline has overlapping and chronologically inconsistent dates that raise credibility questions

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
